          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\u003e **Accuracy disclaimer:** descriptions below are simplified for this educational project. Belgian residence card letters were reorganised in 2021 (C→K, D→L, E→EU, E+→EU+). Verify against official Immigration Office (IBZ/DVZ) sources before encoding legal rules as code."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "| Term | Description |"

          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "|------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "| **A Card** | Limited-duration residence permit (non-EU) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "| **B Card** | Unlimited-duration residence permit (non-EU) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,

          },

          },

          },

          },

            "text": "| **Annex 15, 19, 19ter, 20, 25, 26, 35** | Immigration Office annex documents with distinct legal meanings |"

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "| **Visa C** | Short-stay visa |"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 54,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Set residence category"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "Classifies why the person is in Belgium and runs the residence policy for that category."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "| | |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "|---|---|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "| **Handler** | &#96;SetResidenceCategoryHandler&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "| **Route** | &#96;POST /api/registration/cases/{id}/residence-category&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "| **Blazor** | &#96;ResidenceStep.razor&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "| **Request** | &#96;SetResidenceCategoryRequest(ResidenceCategory)&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "## Domain rules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "- Requires &#96;EnsureIntakeDataEditable()&#96; (&#96;Intake&#96; or &#96;UnderReview&#96;) and &#96;IdentityEstablished&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Sets &#96;RegistrationCase.ResidenceCategory&#96; (overwrites on re-submit — no “already set” guard)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Evaluates policy via &#96;ResidencePolicyEvaluator&#96; → updates &#96;LegalResidenceEstablished&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- EU citizens pass immediately; non-EU worker and student categories require a permit before the flag is set."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "## Correction path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "Uses the **upsert handler** pattern (see [intake corrections](./README.md#intake-corrections-phase-21)): the same &#96;POST&#96; route and handler serve first record and correction. &#96;ResidenceStep.razor&#96; exposes an **Edit** button on the saved category card."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "Changing category re-runs residence policy. If the existing permit type no longer matches the new category (e.g. non-EU worker → student with an A card), &#96;LegalResidenceEstablished&#96; clears until the permit is corrected — the response &#96;PolicyMessage&#96; drives the UI warning."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "## Categories"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "| Value | Policy | Permit required |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "|-------|--------|-----------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "| &#96;EuCitizen&#96; | &#96;EuCitizenPolicy&#96; | No |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| &#96;NonEuWorker&#96; | &#96;NonEuWorkerPolicy&#96; | A or B card |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "| &#96;Student&#96; | &#96;StudentPolicy&#96; | Annex 15 or B card |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 31
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/features/registration/set-residence-category.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.19999903440475464

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "# Phase 3 — Determine Legal Residence Category"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "The employee must determine why the person is in Belgium."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "Examples include:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "EU citizen"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "Non-EU worker"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "Student"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "Researcher"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "Family reunification"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "Highly skilled worker"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "Diplomat"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "International organisation employee"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "Refugee"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "Subsidiary protection"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "Temporary protection"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "Cross-border worker"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "The legal category determines almost everything that follows."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "# Phase 4 — Residence Permit Verification"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "The employee verifies:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "Is the person legally staying in Belgium?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "Possible documents:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "Visa D"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "Visa C"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "Residence permit from another EU state"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "Annex 15"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "Annex 19"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "Annex 19ter"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "Annex 20"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "Annex 25"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "Annex 26"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "Annex 35"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "A Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "B Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "C Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "D Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "F Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "F+ Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "H Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "L Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "M Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "N Card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "Electronic residence card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "Paper certificate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "Each document has different legal consequences."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "# Phase 5 — Address Declaration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "The citizen declares:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "\"I live at...\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "Information collected:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "Street"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "House number"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "Apartment"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "Floor"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "Mailbox"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "Municipality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "Postal code"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "Date of move"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "Questions asked:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "Owner?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "Tenant?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "Living with parents?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "Living with spouse?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "Temporary accommodation?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "Social housing?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "Hotel?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "Shelter?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "Student residence?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "# Phase 6 — Address Documentation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "The municipality may ask for evidence such as:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "Rental contract"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "Purchase deed"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "Authorization from owner"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "Student housing agreement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "Social housing assignment"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "Not every municipality requests the same documents."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "# Phase 7 — Household Composition"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "The employee determines who lives together."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "Questions include:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "Living alone?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "Living with spouse?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "Living with partner?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "Children?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "Parents?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "Other relatives?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "Friends?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "Shared apartment?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "Each resident already registered at the address may appear."
          }
        ],

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        await using var factory = new MunicipalAppFactory();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        await using var scope = factory.Services.CreateAsyncScope();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        var caseId = await OpenAndRecordIdentityAsync(scope.ServiceProvider);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "        var handler = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService\u003cSetResidenceCategoryHandler\u003e();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "        var result = await handler.Handle("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "            caseId,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "            new SetResidenceCategoryRequest(ResidenceCategory.NonEuWorker),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "            CancellationToken.None);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "        result.LegalResidenceEstablished.Should().BeFalse();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        result.PolicyMessage.Should().Contain(\"permit\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    [Fact]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    public async Task RecordResidencePermit_NonEuWorker_WithBCard_MarksLegalResidenceEstablished()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "        await using var factory = new MunicipalAppFactory();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        await using var scope = factory.Services.CreateAsyncScope();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        var caseId = await OpenAndRecordIdentityAsync(scope.ServiceProvider);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        var categoryHandler = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService\u003cSetResidenceCategoryHandler\u003e();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "        await categoryHandler.Handle("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "            caseId,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "            new SetResidenceCategoryRequest(ResidenceCategory.NonEuWorker),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "            CancellationToken.None);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "        var permitHandler = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService\u003cRecordResidencePermitHandler\u003e();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "        var result = await permitHandler.Handle("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "            caseId,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "            new RecordResidencePermitRequest("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "                ResidencePermitType.BCard,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "                DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.UtcNow.AddMonths(-1)),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "                DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.UtcNow.AddYears(1)),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "                \"BC-98765\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "                \"Immigration Office\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "            CancellationToken.None);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "        result.LegalResidenceEstablished.Should().BeTrue();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "        var permitRepo = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService\u003cIResidencePermitRepository\u003e();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "        var permit = await permitRepo.GetByCaseIdAsync(caseId, CancellationToken.None);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "        permit.Should().NotBeNull();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "        permit!.PermitType.Should().Be(ResidencePermitType.BCard);"

            "text": "    }"

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "## Legal residence — EU citizen"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "Once identity is saved, the legal residence section unlocks. EU citizens can be classified without a permit; the checklist marks legal residence as established when policy rules pass."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "![Case detail — identity and EU residence category](./screenshots/02-registration-case-detail.png)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "**Capabilities:** &#96;SetResidenceCategory&#96;, optional &#96;RecordImmigrationDecision&#96; stub, completeness checklist."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "## Legal residence — non-EU worker with permit"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "Non-EU categories require a residence permit. Officers can attach supporting documents and review what is already on file."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "![Full case — identity, non-EU permit, address checklist](./screenshots/06-full-case-with-permit-and-documents.png)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "**Capabilities:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "| Area | Use cases |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "|------|-----------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "| Identity | &#96;RecordIdentity&#96;, &#96;CorrectIdentity&#96; (edit) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "| Residence | &#96;SetResidenceCategory&#96;, &#96;RecordResidencePermit&#96;, &#96;RecordImmigrationDecision&#96; (all editable after save) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "| Documents | &#96;AttachDocument&#96;, &#96;RemoveDocument&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "| Policies | &#96;EuCitizenPolicy&#96;, &#96;NonEuWorkerPolicy&#96;, &#96;StudentPolicy&#96; — checklist &#96;LegalResidenceEstablished&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "## Address declaration (1030 Schaerbeek)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "First registration at this desk requires a domicile **within Schaerbeek**. The municipality is fixed to &#96;1030 Schaerbeek&#96;; officers pick a street from the local register, then enter number and box."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "![Address declaration form — fixed municipality and street autocomplete](./screenshots/10-address-declaration-form.png)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "**Capabilities:** &#96;DeclareAddress&#96; — sets checklist &#96;AddressDeclared&#96;; &#96;RecordHousingSituation&#96; (tenant, owner, …). Both support edit after save."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "## Address, household \u0026 civil status (complete case)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "A fully progressed case shows declared domicile, housing situation, household members, and civil status with marriage details when applicable."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "![Declared address and housing situation](./screenshots/08-address-household-civil-status.png)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "![Household members, civil status, and document upload](./screenshots/09-civil-status-and-household.png)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "**Capabilities:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "| Area | Use cases |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "|------|-----------|"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 101
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 49
          }
        },

          },
          {

            "text": "@inject ISnackbar Snackbar"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,

          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "                            \u003cMudSelectItem T=\"CivilStatus?\" Value=\"CivilStatus.Divorced\"\u003eDivorced\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "                            \u003cMudSelectItem T=\"CivilStatus?\" Value=\"CivilStatus.Widowed\"\u003eWidowed\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "                            \u003cMudSelectItem T=\"CivilStatus?\" Value=\"CivilStatus.Separated\"\u003eSeparated\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "                    \u003c/MudItem\u003e"
          },
          {

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "using FluentAssertions;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Documents;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Immigration;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Immigration.Policies;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "namespace SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Tests.Immigration;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "public sealed class ResidencePolicyTests"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    private static readonly ResidenceValidationContext EmptyDocuments = new("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        ResidenceCategory.EuCitizen,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        null,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        null,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        []);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    [Fact]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    public void EuCitizenPolicy_WithoutPermit_IsValid()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        var policy = new EuCitizenPolicy();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        var result = policy.Validate(EmptyDocuments with { Category = ResidenceCategory.EuCitizen });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        result.IsValid.Should().BeTrue();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    [Fact]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    public void NonEuWorkerPolicy_WithoutPermit_IsInvalid()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        var policy = new NonEuWorkerPolicy();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        var result = policy.Validate(EmptyDocuments with { Category = ResidenceCategory.NonEuWorker });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        result.IsValid.Should().BeFalse();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        result.FailureReason.Should().Contain(\"permit\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    [Fact]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    public void NonEuWorkerPolicy_WithValidBCard_IsValid()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        var policy = new NonEuWorkerPolicy();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        var permit = CreatePermit(ResidencePermitType.BCard, validUntil: DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.UtcNow.AddYears(1)));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        var result = policy.Validate(EmptyDocuments with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "            Category = ResidenceCategory.NonEuWorker,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "            Permit = permit,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        result.IsValid.Should().BeTrue();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    [Fact]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    public void StudentPolicy_WithAnnex15_IsValid()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "        var policy = new StudentPolicy();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "        var permit = CreatePermit(ResidencePermitType.Annex15, validUntil: DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.UtcNow.AddYears(1)));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "        var result = policy.Validate(EmptyDocuments with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "            Category = ResidenceCategory.Student,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "            Permit = permit,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "        result.IsValid.Should().BeTrue();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    [Fact]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    public void EuCitizenPolicy_DoesNotRequireResidencePermitDocument()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        var policy = new EuCitizenPolicy();"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

          },

            "text": "    {"

            "text": "        @if (_case.HousingSituation is null || _editingHousing)"

            "text": "            \u003cAppCard Title=\"Housing situation\" Outlined=\"true\" Class=\"mt-4\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "                \u003cMudForm @ref=\"_housingForm\" @bind-IsValid=\"_housingFormValid\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "                    \u003cAppFormSection Title=\"How does the person occupy this address?\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "                        \u003cMudItem xs=\"12\" md=\"6\"\u003e"

          {

            "text": "                                \u003cMudSelectItem T=\"HousingSituation?\" Value=\"HousingSituation.Tenant\"\u003eTenant\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 98,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "                                \u003cMudSelectItem T=\"HousingSituation?\" Value=\"HousingSituation.Shelter\"\u003eShelter\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "                        \u003c/MudItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "                    \u003c/AppFormSection\u003e"
          },

            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "                    \u003cAppSaveCancelBar SaveText=\"@(_editingHousing ? \"Save changes\" : \"Record situation\")\""
          },
          {

          {

          },
          {

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "### RegistrationCase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "New method: &#96;LinkExistingPerson(NationalRegisterPerson)&#96; — parallel to &#96;RecordIdentity&#96;, same guards (Intake status, no existing PersonId)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "### Conflict rules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "&#96;LinkExistingPersonHandler&#96; rejects linking when:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "- The register record is already linked to another &#96;Person&#96; in this system"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "- The register record's NR number is already assigned to another &#96;Person&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "Throws &#96;NationalRegisterConflictException&#96; → HTTP 409."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "## Seed data (National Register stub)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "Stable IDs exported from &#96;NationalRegisterSeeder&#96; for tests and demos:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "| ID constant | Name | Birth date | Number | Demo use |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "|-------------|------|------------|--------|----------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "| &#96;MarieLeclercId&#96; | Marie Leclerc | 1975-01-01 | BIS 75010112345 | Partial search &#96;Marie&#96;; link + convert BIS |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "| &#96;AmelieBernardId&#96; | Amélie Bernard | 1992-03-20 | BIS 72032054321 | Exact match; duplicate warning demo |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "| &#96;JeanDupontId&#96; | Jean Dupont | 1985-06-12 | NR (generated) | Second link blocked (NR assigned) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "| &#96;JacquesDupontId&#96; | J. Dupont | 1985-06-12 | BIS 75061298765 | Fuzzy given name with full criteria |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "| &#96;SofiaNguyenId&#96; | Sofia Nguyen | 2000-11-08 | NR (generated) | Unrelated control record |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "BIS numbers in seed data start with digit &#96;7&#96; (simulation rule). NR numbers use mod97 check digits via &#96;NationalRegisterNumber.GenerateStub&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "## UI components"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "| Component | Location | Role |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "|-----------|----------|------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "| &#96;NationalRegisterSearchDialog&#96; | &#96;Features/Registration/Components/&#96; | Search form + results table + Link action |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "| Duplicate banner | &#96;RegistrationCaseDetail.razor&#96; | &#96;AppAlert Severity.Warning&#96; when unlinked person has matches ≥ 80 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "| Identity card extensions | &#96;RegistrationCaseDetail.razor&#96; | BIS/NR display, link chip, convert button |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "Design-system alignment: [page template §6 Search results](../design-system/06-page-templates.md#6-search-results-phase-5-nr-search)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "## Demo walkthroughs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "### A — Partial search and link (Marie)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "1. Open a new case."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "2. Click **Search National Register**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "3. Enter only **Marie** in given name → Search."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 218
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 167
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-5-national-register-search-bis.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1344970464706421
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "2. On case detail, under **Legal residence**, choose **EU citizen** → checklist shows **Legal residence ✓** immediately."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "3. For a non-EU worker: choose **Non-EU worker** → checklist stays open → record a **B card** with future validity → **Legal residence ✓**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "## Tests"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "| Project | New tests | Coverage |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "|---------|-----------|----------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "| &#96;Domain.Tests&#96; | 8 | Policies, identity gate, checklist |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "| &#96;Integration.Tests&#96; | 6 | Handlers, API, residence flows |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "dotnet test --configuration Release --filter \"Category!=PostgreSQL\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "Expected: **49 tests passing** in the fast suite (12 domain + 37 integration)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "## Related documents"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "- [ROADMAP.md](../ROADMAP.md)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "    private static string FormatPermitType(ResidencePermitType? permitType) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "        permitType switch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "            ResidencePermitType.ACard =\u003e \"A card\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "            ResidencePermitType.BCard =\u003e \"B card\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "            ResidencePermitType.CCard =\u003e \"C card\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "            ResidencePermitType.Annex15 =\u003e \"Annex 15\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "            ResidencePermitType.EuRegistrationCertificate =\u003e \"EU registration certificate\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "            _ =\u003e \"Select permit type\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "        };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "    private void StartEditingCategory()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "        _selectedCategory = _case.ResidenceCategory;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "        _editingCategory = true;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "    private async Task CancelEditingCategory()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "        if (CategoryFormDirty)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "            var confirmed = await DialogService.ConfirmAsync("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "                \"Discard changes?\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "                \"You have unsaved category changes.\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "                \"Discard\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "            if (!confirmed)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "            {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "                return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "        _editingCategory = false;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "        _selectedCategory = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "    private void ClearCategoryForm() =\u003e _selectedCategory = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "    private async Task HandleCategoryCancel()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "        if (_editingCategory)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "            await CancelEditingCategory();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "        else"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "            ClearCategoryForm();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "    private async Task SaveCategory()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "        await _categoryForm.Validate();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "        if (!_categoryFormValid || _selectedCategory is null)"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "**Demo:** Non-EU worker case with B card reference; EU citizen with lighter requirements."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "**Tests:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "- Policy rejects missing permit for non-EU"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "- EU path skips certain document requirements"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "## Phase 2.1 — Intake corrections ✅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "**Status:** Complete — see [phases/phase-2.1-intake-corrections.md](./phases/phase-2.1-intake-corrections.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "**Goal:** Let officers correct any intake step after it has been saved — identity, legal residence (category, permit, decision), and documents — without abandoning the case or losing later progress."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "**Why now:** Phases 1–2 only support first-time recording; the UI locks sections after save. [ADR-0004](./adr/0004-checklist-over-linear-state-machine.md) and [ARCHITECTURE.md](./ARCHITECTURE.md) already assume flexible intake with corrections during &#96;Intake&#96; and &#96;UnderReview&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "**Slices:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "- &#96;CorrectIdentity&#96; (new domain method + handler + endpoint)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "- Legal residence correction — expose edit UI for category, permit, and immigration decision (permit/decision handlers largely upsert already)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "- &#96;RemoveDocument&#96; (minimum viable document correction)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "**Domain:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "- &#96;Person.Update(IdentityDetails)&#96;; &#96;RegistrationCase.CorrectIdentity(...)&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "- Shared &#96;EnsureIntakeDataEditable()&#96; guard (&#96;Intake&#96; + &#96;UnderReview&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "- Post-correction checklist re-evaluation (e.g. identity/nationality change → re-run residence policy)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "- Cascade rules when category and permit disagree"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "- Edit button + pre-filled form on every saved intake section (design-system edit form pattern)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "- Policy warning when correction leaves checklist invalid until a related step is fixed"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "**Demo:** Record identity → start residence → fix wrong name; change non-EU category → update permit; remove and re-attach wrong document."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "**Tests:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "- Correct identity with residence already set; nationality change clears or restores &#96;LegalResidenceEstablished&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "- Category change with incompatible permit → policy failure until permit corrected"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "- Correction blocked after approval"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "- Document remove persists and updates storage"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 158
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 115
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ROADMAP.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.13005660474300385
    },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "                    \u003cMudForm @ref=\"_permitForm\" @bind-IsValid=\"_permitFormValid\"\u003e"
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "text": "                            \u003cMudItem xs=\"12\" md=\"6\"\u003e"
          },
          {

            "text": "                                           @bind-Value=\"_permitType\""

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "                                \u003cMudDatePicker @bind-Date=\"_validFrom\" Label=\"Valid from\" Required=\"true\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "                            \u003c/MudItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "                            \u003cMudItem xs=\"12\" md=\"6\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "                                \u003cMudDatePicker @bind-Date=\"_validUntil\" Label=\"Valid until\" Required=\"true\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "                            \u003c/MudItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "                            \u003cMudItem xs=\"12\" md=\"6\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "                                \u003cMudTextField @bind-Value=\"_issuingAuthority\" Label=\"Issuing authority\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "                            \u003c/MudItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "                        \u003c/AppFormSection\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "                        \u003cAppSaveCancelBar SaveText=\"@(_editingPermit ? \"Save changes\" : \"Record permit\")\""
          },
          {

            "text": "                                          CancelText=\"@(_editingPermit ? \"Cancel\" : \"Clear\")\""
          }

          },

            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    else"
          },

          },
          {

            "text": "        \u003cAppSection\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "            \u003cAppCard Outlined=\"true\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "                \u003cAppEmptyState Icon=\"@Icons.Material.Outlined.Description\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "                               Title=\"No documents attached\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "                               Description=\"Upload a passport, permit, or other supporting document.\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "            \u003c/AppCard\u003e"

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "@code {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    [Parameter, EditorRequired]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "    public Guid CaseId { get; set; }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    [Parameter, EditorRequired]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    public IReadOnlyList\u003cDocumentDto\u003e Documents { get; set; } = [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    [Parameter, EditorRequired]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    public AttachDocumentHandler AttachHandler { get; set; } = null!;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    [Parameter]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    public bool CanEdit { get; set; }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "    [Parameter]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "    public EventCallback\u003cGuid\u003e OnRemoveDocument { get; set; }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "    [Parameter]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    public EventCallback OnUploaded { get; set; }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    private Guid? _selectedDocumentId;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    private DocumentDto? _selectedDocument =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "        _selectedDocumentId is null"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "            ? null"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "            : Documents.FirstOrDefault(d =\u003e d.Id == _selectedDocumentId);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    protected override void OnParametersSet()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "        if (Documents.Count == 0)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "            _selectedDocumentId = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "            return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "        if (_selectedDocumentId is not null \u0026\u0026 Documents.All(d =\u003e d.Id != _selectedDocumentId))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "            _selectedDocumentId = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    private void SelectDocument(Guid documentId) =\u003e _selectedDocumentId = documentId;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "    private string? GetListItemClass(Guid documentId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "        var classes = new List\u003cstring\u003e { \"registration-case-document-list-item\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "        if (documentId == _selectedDocumentId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "            classes.Add(\"registration-case-document-list-item--selected\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "        return string.Join(' ', classes);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "    private async Task OnDocumentUploaded()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        await OnUploaded.InvokeAsync();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "    private string GetDocumentUrl(Guid documentId) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "        Navigation.ToAbsoluteUri($\"/api/registration/cases/{CaseId}/documents/{documentId}\").ToString();"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Glossary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "Belgian municipal and immigration terms used in this project. English is primary in code; UI may show FR/NL labels later."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## Registers"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "| Term | Code / enum | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "|------|-------------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "| **Population Register** | &#96;RegisterTarget.PopulationRegister&#96; | Primary register for Belgian nationals and persons with established residence rights |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "| **Foreigners Register** | &#96;RegisterTarget.ForeignersRegister&#96; | Non-Belgians registered with residence documentation |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "| **Waiting Register** | &#96;RegisterTarget.WaitingRegister&#96; | Persons awaiting decision or verification |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "| **Special Register** | &#96;RegisterTarget.SpecialRegister&#96; | Diplomats and others under special rules |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "| **National Register** | — | Central population register (RN/RR); municipalities read/write via official systems — **stubbed** in this project |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "| **BIS number** | &#96;BisNumber&#96; | Identification number for persons not (yet) in the National Register; may convert to NR number |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "## Identification numbers"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "| Term | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "|------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "| **National Register number** (NN/NISS) | 11-digit Belgian identification number assigned upon registration |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "| **BIS number** | Temporary or administrative identifier before full NR registration |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "## Roles (actors)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "| Term | Code role | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "|------|-----------|-------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "| **Reception officer** | &#96;ReceptionOfficer&#96; | Front desk; determines visit reason and routing |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "| **Population officer** | &#96;PopulationOfficer&#96; | Handles registration, identity, address, decision |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "| **Police clerk** | &#96;PoliceClerk&#96; | Records residence verification outcomes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| **Citizen** | — | Person requesting registration (not a system user in early phases) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "## Residence documents (simplified)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\u003e **Accuracy disclaimer:** descriptions below are simplified for this educational project. Belgian residence card letters were reorganised in 2021 (C→K, D→L, E→EU, E+→EU+). Verify against official Immigration Office (IBZ/DVZ) sources before encoding legal rules as code."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "| Term | Description |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "|------|-------------|"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 37
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/GLOSSARY.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.12514913082122803
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Forms"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "@using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Documents"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "@using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Registration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "@using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web.Features.Registration.AttachDocument"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\u003cAppCard Title=\"Attach document\" Outlined=\"true\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    \u003cMudSelect T=\"DocumentType\" @bind-Value=\"_documentType\" Label=\"Document type\" Class=\"mb-3\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        \u003cMudSelectItem Value=\"DocumentType.Passport\"\u003ePassport\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        \u003cMudSelectItem Value=\"DocumentType.NationalIdCard\"\u003eNational ID card\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        \u003cMudSelectItem Value=\"DocumentType.BirthCertificate\"\u003eBirth certificate\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        \u003cMudSelectItem Value=\"DocumentType.ResidencePermit\"\u003eResidence permit\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        \u003cMudSelectItem Value=\"DocumentType.Other\"\u003eOther\u003c/MudSelectItem\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    \u003c/MudSelect\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    \u003cMudFileUpload T=\"IBrowserFile\" Accept=\".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png\" FilesChanged=\"OnFileSelected\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        \u003cActivatorContent\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "            \u003cMudButton Variant=\"Variant.Filled\" Color=\"Color.Primary\" StartIcon=\"@Icons.Material.Outlined.Upload\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "                Choose file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "            \u003c/MudButton\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        \u003c/ActivatorContent\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    \u003c/MudFileUpload\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    @if (_selectedFile is not null)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        \u003cMudText Typo=\"Typo.body2\" Class=\"mt-2\"\u003eSelected: @_selectedFile.Name\u003c/MudText\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    \u003cMudButton Class=\"mt-3\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "               Variant=\"Variant.Filled\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "               Color=\"Color.Secondary\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "               Disabled=\"_uploading || _selectedFile is null\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "               OnClick=\"Upload\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        Upload"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    \u003c/MudButton\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\u003c/AppCard\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "@code {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    [Parameter, EditorRequired]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    public Guid CaseId { get; set; }"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
